name: init
description: Initialize the three-tier memory system. Creates required directories and config files for short-term (sliding window), medium-term (summaries), and long-term (vector store) memory storage. Use this at the start of a new workspace or when setting up the memory system for the first time.

name: add
description: Add a memory entry to the specified tier. Use 'short' for immediate conversation context (FIFO sliding window), 'medium' for summarized memories (auto-summarized when token threshold exceeded), or 'long' for permanent vectorized storage (RAG). For adding conversation content during dialogue, use 'short'. For saving important long-term information, use 'long'.

name: search
description: Search long-term memory using semantic similarity (RAG). Queries the ChromaDB vector store for relevant past memories based on semantic similarity. Use this at the start of a new conversation to inject relevant context, or anytime to recall stored information. For viewing short-term window contents, use window instead.

top_k.description: Maximum number of results to return

name: summary
description: Manually trigger summary generation for medium-term memory. Compresses current short-term memories into a summary using LLM and stores as medium-term memory, then clears the short-term window. This is normally automatic when token threshold is exceeded, but can be manually invoked for immediate summarization.

name: status
description: Display the current status of all three memory tiers: short-term (sliding window count and latest message), medium-term (summary count for last 7 days), and long-term (vector store count). Use this to understand what information is currently stored and accessible.

name: window
description: View all messages in the short-term sliding window. Displays current conversation history in FIFO order with timestamps. Use this to see what recent context is available. For searching long-term memory, use search instead.
